data.description: Acrivon Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Recent Business Highlights

data.title: Foundation Risk Partners and ARTDAI Announce Partnership to Deliver Best-In-Class Risk Advisory for Fine Art and Collectibles
data.description: A recent development in the art market industry is the strategic partnership between Foundation Risk Partners (FRP) and ARTDAI. This collaboration, announced on March 19, 2026, is significant as it showcases the increasing acknowledgment of fine art. The Private Client Practice at FRP will be leading this venture, teaming up with ARTDAI, renowned for its art market data and analytics services. This partnership is set to have a nationwide reach, amplifying its impact across the industry. The agreement marks a key milestone in the art market, with both entities poised to leverage their expertise for mutual growth and success.

data.title: Bitcoin Slides To $70,000 As Inflation Outlook Weighs On Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin
data.description: Bitcoin's price dropped to around $70,000 following the outflows from ETFs and an increased inflation forecast for 2026. On Wednesday, Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $129.6 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw $55.5 million in net outflows. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $70,205.74, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,175.81, Solana (SOL) at $89.89, XRP at $1.46, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.09420, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.05756. Meme coin market capitalization has decreased by 5.3% recently. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: CHNR Announces Non-Binding Letter of Intent to Acquire Majority Stake in HooRii Technology, Marking Strategic Shift to Physical AI
data.description: On March 19, 2026, a holding company CHNR, listed on NASDAQ as CHNR, based in Hong Kong, disclosed the signing of a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) with Feishang Group Limited. China Natural Resources, Inc. operates in the exploration and mining sector. The agreement signifies a significant move for the company, suggesting potential growth in its business operations.

data.title: Energy and natural resources leaders divided on transition investments and peak oil
data.description: In the latest findings, four major trends have surfaced in the investment landscape – firstly, policy uncertainty is driving changes in investment strategies, secondly, an anticipation of more restructurings in the future, thirdly, the scarcity of return on investment for Artificial Intelligence (AI) projects, and finally, utilities are focusing on the most financially viable investments to meet the increasing power demand from AI technologies. These trends were identified in a report released in Boston on March 19, 2026.

data.title: C2N Diagnostics Highlights First Use of Its eMTBR-tau243 Plasma Assay in Evoke/Evoke+ Phase 3 Dataset for Prediction of Cognitive and Functional Decline in Patients With Early Symptomatic Alzheimer’s Disease
data.description: St. Louis-based company C2N Diagnostics showcased the debut of its eMTBR-tau243 plasma assay in a Phase 3 dataset (Evoke/Evoke+), indicating a continued focus on tau-related signals in Alzheimer’s disease research. The announcement was made at the AD/PD™ 2026 Alzheimer's & Parkinson's Diseases Conference during the Evoke/Evoke+ Trial Symposium. This innovative assay marks a significant development in the field, underlining the company's commitment to advancing diagnostic capabilities.

data.title: Cyngn Featured in NVIDIA Article About Building Robots with AI
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Mountain View, California, Cyngn (NASDAQ: CYN) was mentioned in an article by NVIDIA focusing on the importance of simulation in driving progress in autonomous robotics. The article showcases Cyngn utilizing NVIDIA Isaac Sim to conduct tests on forklift tire dynamics. This acknowledgment underscores Cyngn's involvement in cutting-edge technology development within the autonomous robotics sector.
Earnings Scheduled For March 19, 2026

data.title: Extreme Raises the Bar on Sustainable Networking, Achieving Industry’s First EPEAT-Registered Solutions for Customers
data.description: In Morrisville, North Carolina, Extreme Networks has become the premier networking vendor to attain EPEAT registry status for its switches and access points. This makes them the sole company in this sector to achieve this recognition thus far.

data.title: Keenfolks Launches KEENFOLKS X_
data.description: In London and Barcelona, the long-standing holding company model in global marketing is under strain due to factors such as capital markets, consolidations, and client expectations, signaling a necessity for a new structural approach. The marketing sector is in pursuit of an innovative model as agencies are compelled to adapt. The focus now lies on identifying agencies that are inherently prepared for this transformation. Keenfolks, the Integrative AI® partner tailored for the current era, stands out in this evolving landscape as agencies navigate change.

data.title: Colombia’s Bre‑B Hits More than 500 Million Transactions as ACI Worldwide and Banco de la República Take the Stage at Fintech Americas 2026
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, Colombia's rapid advancement in real-time payments is evident as Bre-B has successfully handled over 500 million transactions and recorded 100 million payment keys in just five months. This growth solidifies the system as one of Latin America's fastest-scaling real-time payment platforms. ACI's significant role in this milestone has earned them the Central Banking Financial Market Infrastructure Services - Retail Award for this year.

data.title: Cirrus360 presents 5G-edge-cloud innovation for workflow automation for small and medium meat processors
data.description: Richardson, TX - On March 19, 2026, Cirrus360 introduced their groundbreaking 5G-edge-cloud technology aimed at enhancing workflow automation for small and medium-sized meat processing businesses. The innovation was showcased at the 2026 International Livestock Congress in Houston, TX on March 4-5, 2026. This event attracted industry professionals and experts for a significant discussion on the future of livestock processing.

data.title: Fervo Energy Secures $421 Million in Non-Recourse Project Financing for Cape Station
data.description: Fervo Energy has recently finalized a significant milestone by securing $421 million in non-recourse debt financing for the Cape Station geothermal project in Houston.

data.title: Empire Petroleum Announces Full Subscription of Rights Offering
data.description: An oil and gas company, Empire Petroleum Corporation (NYSE American: EP), disclosed that its rights offering (the “Rights Offering”) has been completely taken up. With producing assets in New Mexico, North Dakota, Montana, Texas, and Louisiana, the company informed that the subscription period for the Rights Offering concluded on March 18, 2026, at 5:00 p.m., Eastern Time. The response exceeded expectations, as subscriptions totaled over 100% of the secur...

data.title: X-energy, Talen Energy to Evaluate Gigawatt-Scale Xe-100 SMR Deployment
data.description: X-energy Reactor Company, LLC, a prominent developer of advanced nuclear reactors and fuel technology, and Talen Energy Corporation, a top independent power producer, have entered into a Letter of Intent to evaluate the potential deployment of X-energy's Xe-100 small modular reactors in Pennsylvania and the broader PJM Interconnection Regional Transmission Organization market. The Companies aim to assess the feasibility of utilizing these SMRs across the PJM market.

data.title: Lifezone Metals Announces 2025 Financial Results and Filing of Form 20-F
data.description: Lifezone Metals Limited (NYSE: LZM) CEO Chris Showalter and CFO Ingo Hofmaier revealed the 2025 financial results and submitted the Annual Report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report can be accessed on Edgar and the company’s site. Despite a tough nickel market, the company made progress on the Kabanga Nickel Project, focusing on high-grade ores. Throughout 2025, they navigated through the challenges posed by the market, showcasing resilience and determination in their operations.

data.title: PHEV Tire Satisfaction Increases, Closing Gap with ICE and BEV Original Equipment Tires, JD Power Finds
data.description: In Troy, Michigan, a recent report from JD Power reveals a rise in satisfaction levels among Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle (PHEV) owners regarding their tires. The gap between satisfaction levels for PHEV tires and those for Internal Combustion Engine (ICE) and Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) original equipment tires has narrowed. This indicates a positive trend as PHEV tire satisfaction continues to improve.
